name: CloudTrail trail not logging
description: A CloudTrail trail exists but is not actively logging. When logging is stopped, all API activity in the account goes unrecorded, providing attackers with a window to operate without forensic evidence.
remediation: Re-enable CloudTrail logging immediately: aws cloudtrail start-logging --name <trail-name>. Implement an AWS Config rule (cloud-trail-enabled) and an SNS alert for CloudTrail logging state changes.
